note: As-built (matches the intended design): the /gogo:done board is the pipeline cockpit — one mode with action keys (v view, s ship, m ship-merged, g go/resume, / filter, q cancel); every action is a single-shot intent (schema v2) the orchestrator executes and then relaunches the board (view/ship loop back; go hands off; cancel stops). board.py stays a no-mutation selector. flow = the /gogo:done -> classify -> board -> route -> relaunch control flow; activity = board.py's internal key -> guard -> intent state machine (the new selector logic). As-is baseline (ship-only board) in charts/before/.

diagrams.title: As-built: board cockpit — action keys -> intents -> route -> relaunch loop
As-built: board.py key -> guard -> intent state machine (filter-edit vs command mode)
